resultParseStatus.CFBlockedNotes: It may be because the site has enabled CloudFlare's security protection, which makes it impossible to retrieve data. You can first try to manually access the site once to pass the verification. If that doesn't work, just wait for the site to recover on its own.

SpecialThank.sortByName: The list is sorted by name
thankNote: During the development and testing of this project, they have given a lot of help and support (or development, or testing, or sending invite, or suggesting, or encouraging, or spurring), thank you.
Since we can't list all the people who helped, Please understand if there are any omissions.
Thanks for these at the same time:

TechnologyStack.thankNote: The birth of 'PT Plugin Plus' is established on the base of these projects. Thanks all the participants of the project, thanks for your contribution!

ui.tableMultiSortNote: Multi-column sorting: Click any table header field to start sorting, which will display the number \"1\" on the field. Click other fields sequentially to display \"2\", \"3\", indicating sorting priority. Click the same field again to toggle between ascending, descending, or cancel sorting. The sorting order is determined by these numbers, with smaller numbers having higher priority.
ui.showReleaseNote: Show changelog window when plugin updates
ui.saveTableBehavior: Remember table header columns, sorting, pagination, etc.
ui.enableTableMultiSort: Enable multi-column sorting for some tables
ui.contentScriptWarning: After enabling or disabling related features, save settings and refresh the site page for changes to take effect.
ui.allowExceptionSites: Allow setting exception sites without sidebar (enable in site settings)
ui.enableOnSocialSite: Enable sidebar on social sites (e.g. Douban, IMDb)
ui.enableFadeEffect: Enable fade-in effect (semi-transparent by default, shows on hover)
ui.confirmTwoStep: Require two-step confirmation for batch copy, local download, etc. on torrent list pages
ui.allowDragLink: Allow dragging links to the sidebar button
ui.dragNote: Dragged download links may not always be correctly recognized!

searchEntity.forceImdbIdMatchFilter: When searching by IMDb, filter out results whose IMDb ID returned by the site does not match
searchEntity.autoDetectOfficialGroupFromTitle: Auto Detect Official Tag From Torrent Title
searchEntity.quickSiteFilter: Quick Site Filter In Search Page
searchEntity.mediaSearchLimit: Number of search results per request
searchEntity.mediaSearchLimitMessage: Please do not load too many search results at once. It's not optimized with virtual-scroll, which may cause the browser to freeze and affect the performance of the media server.
searchEntity.autoLoadInitialMediaWall: Automatically load the initial media wall
searchEntity.autoLoadMoreMediaOnScroll: Automatically load more media when scrolling to the bottom of the page
searchEntity.treatTTQueryAsImdbSearch: Treat tt\d{7,8} search terms directly as IMDb search
searchEntity.imdbTip: When disabled, you need to use the `imdb|tt12345678` format for IMDb searches.

localDownloadMethodOptions.webTip: Open the page corresponding to the download link (only applicable to the simplest method; if conditions are not met, it will fall back to @:SetBase.download.localDownloadMethodOptions.extension )
localDownloadMethodOptions.browserTip: (RECOMMEND) Use the browser's download method provided by the extension to download directly
localDownloadMethodOptions.extensionTip: The extension downloads the torrent in the background and proxies it to @:SetBase.download.localDownloadMethodOptions.browser for downloading

download.saveDownloadHistory: Save download history (Please do not disable this function unless necessary)
download.startupAutoFetchDownloaderStatus: Automatically load the downloader status when entering the downloader settings page
download.localDownloadIgnoreInterval: Ignore site download interval limit for local downloads
download.saveLastDownloader: Save the last used download server settings
download.allowDirectSendToClient: Allow sending links directly (instead of torrent files) to the download server (Do not enable unless necessary)
download.quickSendToClientNote:
When quick push is enabled, the plugin will perform the following default actions when pushing download tasks:
1. Flatten the downloader and download directory options for direct click-to-push.
2. When hovering over an option, the label list will temporarily open; clicking will additionally add label information.
3. All use local relay mode to push torrents, and basic settings like 'auto-start download' and downloader-specific configs are determined by downloader and site settings.

oneClickImportDialog.title: One-Click Import Sites
oneClickImportDialog.alert1: This operation will attempt to import the sites you select with default configurations. Please ensure you have logged into these sites in your browser. The import process cannot be interrupted, please wait patiently.
oneClickImportDialog.stats: Selected {count} sites, added {success} sites, failed to add {failed} sites.

status.manual: This site needs to be added manually

oneClickImportDialog.importComplete: One-click import complete, successfully added {count} sites

Editor.downloadLinkSuffixHint: This field will be automatically appended to the site's download links
Editor.downloadLinkSuffixExample: E.g. if the plugin gets https://example.com/download.php?id=1 and you set &passkey=xxxx, the final download link will be https://example.com/download.php?id=1&passkey=xxxx
Editor.requestTimeoutHint: Affects the timeout for site requests (torrent search, user info retrieval)
Editor.downloadIntervalHint: Affects the download interval for this site (for safety, the plugin will not strictly follow this setting; the actual interval is always slightly greater than or equal to the set interval)

RestoreDialog.title: Restore from Backup File
RestoreDialog.missingVersion: Backup data is missing version info, cannot restore
RestoreDialog.versionWarning: Backup data version is higher than the current extension version. Restoring may cause data incompatibility or loss. Continue?

userInfo.showDeadSite: Show sites marked as dead (isDead) in the overview
userInfo.showPassedSite: Show sites marked as offline (isOffline) or not allowing user info query in the overview

ptppSettings.saveKeyNotice: Note: The key is only saved in the current browser and will not be backed up, please keep it safe; data cannot be recovered if the key is lost after encryption. Leave blank for no encryption.
ptppSettings.invalidFileFormat: Invalid file format, please check if the backup was exported correctly (with the backup encryption feature turned off).
ptppSettings.importConfigInfoLine1: {repoName} can only import user history data from the original PT-Plugin-Plus. Other configuration files are not supported.
ptppSettings.importConfigInfoPrep: Before importing, please make the following preparations:
ptppSettings.importStep1: First, please back up the current configuration file of {repoName}.
ptppSettings.importStep2: In the site settings of {repoName}, add the sites that need to be restored. (If a site is not added, its corresponding user history data will be ignored).
ptppSettings.importStep3: In PT-Plugin-Plus, disable the backup encryption feature and export the local backup file. It should be a zip file named PT-Plugin-Plus-Backup-yyyy-MM-DD_hh-mm-ss.zip.
ptppSettings.importStep4: Upload the zip package or the extracted userdatas.json file to the input box below.

RestorePtppUserDataDialog.title: Restore PT-Plugin-Plus User History Data

RestorePtppUserDataDialog.importSuccess: Import successful. The window will close automatically in 5s. Please refresh the page.
